data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Materials used tracking (with receipt photo upload)', but the evidence provided does not confirm that this requirement is fully implemented or functioning as expected. While the linked use case mentions the upload of receipts for materials, there is no concrete evidence of the API endpoints or checks that validate this functionality. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary validation steps were not demonstrated.
gaps: Lack of evidence for API endpoints or checks validating materials used tracking and receipt photo upload.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define API endpoint for materials tracking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that materials tracking includes receipt photo upload functionality.
